name: TheFront
description:
This Docker will download and install SteamCMD. It will also install The Front and run it.

Initial server configuration:  
**Servername:** The Front Docker
**Password:** Docker  

Your configuration file is located at: .../TheFrontManager/ServerConfig_.ini

**ATTENTION:** First startup can take very long since it downloads the gameserver files and it also installs the runtimes which can take quite some time! 

Update Notice: Simply restart the container if a newer version of the game is available.

ports.name: UDP Ports
ports.description: UDP PortsFirstPort: Game PortSecondPort: Beacon PortThirdPort: Query Port(If you need other ports delete this entry and create new UDP port mappings here in the template with the Container and Host port set to the same as in your EXTRA_GAME_PARAMS variable).

variables.name: GAME_ID
variables.description: The GAME_ID that the container downloads at startup. If you want to install a static or beta version of the game change the value to: '2334200 -beta YOURBRANCH' (without quotes, replace YOURBRANCH with the branch or version you want to install).

variables.name: Game Parameters
variables.description: Change if needed (put '?' in between the options if using multiple)

variables.name: Extra Game Parameters
variables.description: Change if needed (specify your extra game parameters here like: Servername, Password, Ports,...).

variables.name: Public IP
variables.description: Set your public IP here (if set to 'auto' the container will try to obtain the public IP automatically)

variables.name: Validate Installation
variables.description: Set the Variable to 'true' if you want to validate the installation otherwise leave it blank.
